history.text: British South Africa Company rule began in the region later called Northern Rhodesia.
Northern Rhodesia became a British protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Zambia became independent with Kenneth Kaunda as its first president.
Multiparty elections ended one-party rule placed the territory under outside administration.
